dialog.stepLabel: ??: "Pleased to make your acquaintance. I apologize for the delay..."

items.text: Pleased to make your acquaintance. I apologize for the delay. My name is Sanhua, the bodyguard of Madam Magistrate.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: I regret to inform you that Madam Magistrate is currently away. Prior to her departure, she instructed me to bring you these tokens and a welcome gift.

dialog.stepLabel: Sanhua: "Madam Magistrate advised you to explore what these tokens re..."

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Madam Magistrate advised you to explore what these tokens represent during her absence. This may help you acquire the information you desire sooner.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: I apologize for the inconvenience, but please rest assured: she will be here to meet you in three days' time.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Sorry... I cannot disclose her whereabouts at this time. Please trust me that she is eagerly looking forward to meeting you in person.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Pardon my inability to provide a better answer. Madam Magistrate has a task that she must handle alone, but she has never for one moment forgotten about her meeting with you.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Not knowing exactly when you'd arrive, she had to leave without having the chance to welcome you in person.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Because she will require at least three days to complete her current task.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Madam Magistrate wanted to assure you that in three days, by any means, she will return to meet you in person.

options.text: Is there anything I can do to help?

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: You...

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: I'll be sure to convey your kindness to Madam Magistrate. Please accept my sincerest gratitude.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Yes, Madam Magistrate does hope to have your assistance, but there is no rush for a decision. She does not want to pressure you into anything you may not desire. We invite you to learn about our situation before making a final commitment.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: When it comes to these tokens, it is never her intention to confuse you with the puzzles. Instead, they should serve as clues that lead you toward the truth.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Madam Magistrate deeply regrets not having the time to deliver her messages to you in person.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: We value your presence far more than you might imagine. The same goes for any and all information about you.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Since Madam Magistrate is currently away, I cannot make the final confirmation on her behalf.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: But you. You are truly exceptional.

options.text: I heard many people were "politely" asked to leave.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Regarding that...

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: My eyes can see the frequencies of all living beings.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Or rather, those "frequencies" are the only thing I can see.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: You... You share the same frequency with Madam Magistrate.

options.text: What does my frequency look like?

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: You look undistorted and authentic, in your original form.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Apologies. My description was not accurate.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Both you and Madam Magistrate look undistorted to me.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: In my eyes, you appear the way you are.

options.text: What do the frequencies of others look like?

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: They all look different.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: For some reason, you can tell Sanhua doesn't want to continue this topic.

dialog.stepLabel: Baizhi: "Can you give us some more details?..."

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: Can you give us some more details?

options.text: A giant Tacet Discord with a scythe...
An enormous moon fading in and out of the sky...

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: A giant Tacet Discord with a scythe... It doesn't sound like the Crownless. Might be even higher-ranked.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: An enormous moon looming above you... Now, this reminds me of the unusual sightings that supposedly happened during a past war...

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: This is the first time we've run into anything like this since we put the training ground into use...

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: The Sonoro Sphere captures everything that once happened in a specific time and place, be it good or bad.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: We built this simulated training ground after the structure of Sonoro Spheres.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: Our goal was to extract pure Remnant Energy with the simulated Sonoro Sphere, but we cannot guarantee that all "abnormal frequencies" were eliminated.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: Your arrival may have revived the "abnormal frequencies" we accidentally captured.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: Remnant Energy sometimes give rise to memory manifestations of sentient beings. You may have encountered one such manifestation.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: I suspect it could have something to do with your unconscious mind.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: Such anomalies could have been hiding in the simulation, and they 'resonated' with your subconscious. Or perhaps... they were lifted from your subconscious in the first place.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: I'm afraid I can't give you a conclusion yet. Not until we've run a thorough analysis on the data collected.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: I'll also check the simulated Sonoro Sphere again to see what on earth happened to it.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: In terms of bodily functions, you seem to be in perfect health... In fact, all the data look quite good.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: But if you feel anything unusual, please come find me any time.

dialog.stepLabel: Chixia: "There’s still some distance to the Huaxu Academy. Let’s see ..."

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: There’s still some distance to the Huaxu Academy. Let’s see who reaches there faster!

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: I just installed some apps for you. Please try looking for one that’s called Utility on the Terminal.
